\centry{Pathways to College -- UC Davis}{Vice President and Peer Mentor}{Davis, CA}{September 2015 -- June 2019}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Led mentorship initiatives serving under-resourced high schools in the Sacramento Valley, coordinating a network of 40 volunteer mentors and 120 high school mentees
  \item Designed and facilitated workshops for seniors on college application strategy, including personal statement writing, FAFSA completion, scholarship identification, and financial aid appeals
  \item Reviewed and provided structured feedback on personal statements and supplemental essays, supporting mentees in articulating their identities and goals to admissions committees
  \item Maintained yearlong one-on-one mentorship relationships, providing academic guidance and emotional support to first-generation college-going students throughout the application cycle
\end{itemize}
